name: Dolby.io
description: Dolby.io — real-time communication and media APIs with Dolby audio quality

seo.title: Dolby.io — Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure
seo.meta_description: Dolby.io: Dolby.io — real-time communication and media APIs with Dolby audio quality

when_to_use: Adding Dolby-quality audio enhancement to conferencing apps
Real-time noise cancellation for communication platforms
Media API for spatial audio in virtual events and metaverse
Voice isolation and audio clarity in WebRTC-based apps
Broadcast-quality audio processing as a developer API

pros: Premium audio quality with Dolby processing
Real-time communication plus media APIs in one vendor
Good for media-heavy apps like music and podcasts
Solid SDKs across web and mobile
cons: Pricing premium over commodity WebRTC vendors
Overkill if your app only needs basic voice/video
Smaller dev community than Agora or Twilio
Feature velocity tied to Dolby priorities
review.verdict: Worth paying for when audio fidelity is a product differentiator; otherwise cheaper WebRTC providers suffice.
review.best_for: Music, podcast and broadcast apps prioritizing audio quality
review.not_for: Generic video chat or conferencing on tight budgets
